---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/my_image.jpg"
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/leonhard_reiter
    - icon: osf
      text: OSF
      href: https://osf.io/5zu6h/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/leonhardreitr
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/leonhard-reiter-a93470229
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:leonhard.reiter@univie.ac.at"
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# Hey there!

I am Leonhard, but most people just call me Lenni and I am a master student in psychology at the University of Vienna. I work at the University of Vienna as a student assistant at the Social and Economic Psychology group under Prof. Dr. Robert Böhm. Currently I am also a research intern at the Institute for Cognition and Behavior of the WU Vienna under Prof. Dr. Susann Fiedler, where I help to prepare a bachelor course on the p/z-curve as well as doing research employing them.

My research interest consists of meta-science, data science with R and Bayesian statistics. I am currently working on a meta-analysis as my master thesis. I did some research on Human-AI-interaction also. I value open-science and reproducible workflows. If you want to check out some of the stuff that I do, see my Github and OSF.

I love reading books, especially R or quantitative science related ones. So if you want to chat about stats, give me book recommendations or want to collaborate, write me an email 🤓.
